get.description:
Verified Health Check for InfluxDB 3.6.0.
Fixes the 'MissingToken' error on /ping and the 'Ghost 443' gRPC bug.
Retrieve all inventory records from the view for troubleshooting.

Sets the global flag to False to break the simulation loop.

Retrieves a summarized view of all customers, including counts for
services, fabric connections, ports, and interfaces.

get.description: Retrieve a single customer by customer_id.

Retrieve all fabric services in the system.
- **returns**: Array of fabric service objects
- **example**: 
  ```
  GET /fabric_services/
  → [
    {"service_id":"uuid","name":"ServiceA","description":"Core fabric service"},
    {"service_id":"uuid","name":"ServiceB","description":"Edge fabric service"}
  ]
  ```

schema.title: Response Get Fabric Services Fabric Services  Get

post.description:
Create a new fabric service in the system.
- **data**: Request body containing the fabric service details
- **returns**: Newly created fabric service object
- **example**:
  ```
  POST /fabric_services/
  {
    "name": "ServiceA",
    "description": "Core fabric service"
  }
  → {"service_id":"uuid","name":"ServiceA","description":"Core fabric service"}
  ```

get.summary: Get full Fabric Service detail including nested connections

get.description: API endpoint to list all fabric services for a given customer.

get.description: API endpoint to list all fabric services for a given customer.

schema.title: Response Get Fabric Services For Customer Fabric Services  Service Id  Get

delete.summary: Delete a fabric service by ID
delete.description:
Delete a fabric service by its UUID.
- **service_id**: Path parameter for the fabric service UUID
- **returns**: Success message if deleted
- **example**:
  ```
  DELETE /fabric_services/123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
  → {"detail":"FabricPort 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000 deleted successfully"}
  ```

get.description:
Retrieve all ports in the system.
- returns: Array of port objects

post.summary: Create a new port for a device
post.description:
Create a new port attached to a given device.
- **device_name**: Path parameter for the device
- **new_port**: Body payload with values for the new port
- **returns**: Newly created port object
Router to handle the ingestion of the 12 port rows.

Get Ports By Customer Id Api

put.summary: Update a port by device and port name
put.description:
Update all values of a port by device name and port name.
- **device_name**: Path parameter for the device
- **port_name**: Path parameter for the port
- **updates**: Body payload with new values for the port
- **returns**: Updated port object

delete.summary: Delete a port by device and port name
delete.description:
Delete a port by device name and port name.
- **device_name**: Path parameter for the device
- **port_name**: Path parameter for the port
- **returns**: Success message if deleted

session_state.description: Operational BGP state (Idle, Active, Established, etc.)
